kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given The Login Page Is Open
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When The User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
And When The User Clicks The Login Button
Then The User Should See The Success Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Wrong Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given The Login Page Is Open
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When The User Enters Invalid Password
Enter Username
And When The User Clicks The Login Button
Then The User Should See The Wrong Password Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Wrong Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given The Login Page Is Open
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When The User Enters Invalid Username
And When The User Clicks The Login Button
Then The User Should See The Wrong Username Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given The Login Page Is Open
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When The User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
And When The User Clicks The Login Button
And The User Should See The Success Message
When The User Clicks The Logout Button
Then The User Should Be Redirected To The Login Page
And The User Should See The Logout Confirmation Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
